content: Formula-bar Tab is now landed through merged PR #250. I also verified the actual remote `run/facebook/main` snapshot by fetching it and running the trunk test suites from an archive, and they passed cleanly.
Merged PR #250: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/250. It fixes formula-bar `Tab` so the draft commits and selection moves right, matching the in-cell editing path.

I reviewed and merged your focused formula-bar Tab fix PR: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/250. It was the cleanest minimal version of the open formula-bar Tab changes and is now landed on `run/facebook/main`.
